short_summary: Iran deal progress, mild energy relief possible
rationale: A potential US-Iran deal remains the most relevant development for Portugal via possible energy price easing; no other headlines materially affect daily life in Portugal.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly close to signing
top_events.summary: If finalized, a US-Iran deal could ease global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Portugal's cost of living and tourism-dependent economy. Outcome still uncertain.

top_events.title: UK forces seize suspected Russian shadow fleet tanker in English Channel
top_events.summary: Seizure of a Russian tanker in the English Channel is notable for Atlantic shipping lanes relevant to Portugal, though direct impact on daily life remains minimal.

top_events.title: Switzerland votes on population cap referendum
top_events.summary: Swiss vote on capping population at 10 million reflects EU migration debates; very limited direct relevance to Portugal's daily life.
